subject: EXAMPLE — disinflation trend intact; duration stance input
analyticalMethods: YoY transformation of CPIAUCSL (calculated, method in note)

findings.statement: Headline CPI YoY declined for the third consecutive month per latest-vintage FRED data (as of the most recent monthly print).
The disinflation trend supports a modestly longer duration stance over a 3-month horizon.

assumptions: No energy-price shock over the horizon
limitations: FRED data is EOD/monthly and revised; point-in-time vintages not used in this example
This is a synthetic EXAMPLE artifact demonstrating the schema — not real analysis
unresolvedQuestions: Shelter component stickiness vs private rent indices
recommendedNextAction: PM to review duration stance vs current limit headroom; risk view requested before any sizing.

dissents.position: Disinflation is priced; duration add is late.
dissents.rationale: Forward curve already implies the cutting cycle; risk/reward at current levels is asymmetric.
